title: Wander
description: This modpack is a perfect blend of carefully selected mods that offer a diverse and immersive gaming experience. The lush green environment is a treat to the eyes and offers a perfect backdrop for your gaming adventures.
body:
This modpack features 20 new mobs, revamped biomes, and improved sound physics. Additionally, the Nether, End, and structures have all been revamped for a perfect gameplay experience.

The mods that help make the gameplay of this pack:

Naturalist
BetterX
All YUNGS Better Mods
Tectonic
Farmer's Delight
Artifacts 
Mythic Mobs
Geophillic
Wilder Wild
Towns and Towers
Trinkets
Deeper and Darker
Sound Physics Remastered
ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
Comforts

The mods that help optimize the gameplay of this pack:

Sodium
Sodium Extra
Starlight
Iris Shaders
Indium
Translations for sodium
Entity Culling

This modpack has been meticulously crafted with a selection of mods that have been chosen to offer a truly diverse and immersive gaming experience. Each mod has been carefully evaluated to ensure that it complements the gameplay and enhances the overall gaming experience. 

The environment in this modpack is a visual delight - the lush green surroundings are breathtaking and offer a perfect setting for your gaming adventures. Every detail has been taken into consideration to provide a seamless and enjoyable gaming experience.

In addition to the carefully selected mods, this modpack also includes a few performance optimization mods that ensure that the game runs smoothly without any lag. Specialized texture packs have also been included to provide a more realistic and immersive gaming experience. 

This modpack is sure to keep you engaged and entertained for hours on end. :)
